sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99187" key="sunamfia/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συναμφιάζω</orth>, <sense id="n99187.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">envelop closely</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τοὺς πόδας λῃδίῳ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1270.tlg001:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Clearch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">25</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
